australia.name: Australia
nationalAgencies: Federal policing, protective services and national law-enforcement capability.
Border protection, customs and immigration enforcement.
National security, emergency management and critical-infrastructure policy.
National disaster preparedness, response and recovery coordination.
Maritime safety and national aeronautical and maritime search-and-rescue coordination.
Weather, flood, cyclone, fire-weather and aviation services.
National geospatial, earth-observation and natural-hazard intelligence.

canada.name: Canada
nationalAgencies: Federal policing and contracted provincial, territorial and municipal policing.
National public-safety, emergency-management and security policy.
Maritime safety, environmental response and search-and-rescue support.
National public-health preparedness and emergency response.
Federal protected-area operations, wildfire response and visitor safety.
Canadian Armed Forces — Search and Rescue
Civil air-navigation services and airspace coordination.

united-kingdom.name: United Kingdom
nationalAgencies: Serious and organised crime and national law-enforcement coordination.
Maritime safety and HM Coastguard functions.
Police aviation support across England and Wales.
National weather and aviation meteorological services.
Resilience and Emergencies Division / Cabinet Office

south-africa.name: South Africa
nationalAgencies: National policing and specialist operational support.
Protected-area operations, wildfire and environmental response.

european-union.name: European Union
nationalAgencies: EU aviation-safety and UAS regulatory framework.
EU law-enforcement cooperation and intelligence support.
European Union Agency for the Space Programme
EU space services, including Galileo and Copernicus programme support.
